beeswax.b: An occlusive wax that thickens and adds body to balms, lipsticks, and creams while forming a protective barrier on the skin's surface to slow moisture loss.

behenyl alcohol.b: A long-chain fatty alcohol that thickens and stabilizes emulsions while acting as an emollient to keep skin surface smooth.
